title: normalize_coincidence_matrix_v1 — promote staging_coincidence_matrix_v0 → coincidence_matrix_v1
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='normalize_coincidence_matrix'. Reads a previously-captured staging_coincidence_matrix_v0 envelope (by layer_id), coerces types, derives c_coincidence = r_ab / (r_a * r_b) when the producer omits it (and inputs are valid), drops rows missing required identifiers, flags rows with c > 3 as likely negative-interference artefacts, and emits a typed coincidence_matrix_v1 envelope. Lineage preserved via provenance.source_layer_ids. Fifth meiosis-atlas normalize action; mirrors the prior four.

source_layer_id.description: layer_id of the staging_coincidence_matrix_v0 envelope to promote.

source_layer_ids.description: Optional alias for multi-source converters; single-source actions use source_layer_id.

column_map.description: Maps source column names to canonical coincidence_matrix_v1 names. Defaults to identity per the SPEC §3.

neg_interference_threshold.description: C values strictly above this threshold are counted in summary.n_neg_interference_flagged and the consumer is expected to highlight them in red.
